YieldMax® Introduces Option Income Strategy ETF on Reddit, Inc. (RDDT)

holdings.infoBox: RDYY is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax RDDT Option Income Strategy ETF (RDYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Reddit Inc. stock (RDDT) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys RDYY was launched on Sep 8, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
